---
title: "Lectures"
author: "Bill Perry"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: full

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    downloads: []
    embed-resources: false
    self-contained: false

listing:
  contents: "*/**.qmd"
  type: table
  sort: "title asc"
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
---

These are all the lectures so far
